highlights.title: SpaceX, OpenAI Windfall Fuels Bets on Next-Wave Asian AI Winners
highlights.description: The hunt is on for companies that could benefit from the tailwinds of an unprecedented wave of stock offerings in the US, and investors are increasingly honing in on the Asian supply chain.

highlights.title: This Trump-linked startup plans to put humanoid robots in the military
highlights.description: With ties to the Trump family,  Foundation Robotics Labs is aiming to deploy humanoid robots in the military in the next 12 to 18 months.

highlights.title: Leaked photo compares Samsung’s wider Galaxy Z Fold 8 to the ‘Ultra’ one
highlights.description:
A new leak shows off the difference, in person, of the Galaxy Z Fold 8’s wider form factor versus the “Ultra” one we’re already used to.
more…

highlights.title: Juiced Bikes now shipping its game-changing electric mopeds in the US
highlights.description:
Juiced Bikes says its newly launched Scrambler e-bikes are now officially in stock and shipping, marking the next step in the brand’s return after its acquisition and relaunch under the team behind Lectric eBikes.
more…

highlights.description: Project Headroom could save you big money, too
